methodology.anomaly_rule: absolute price change >=20% and robust MAD z-score >=3.5
methodology.identity: My Cloud Grocer Id scoped to store 6; SPId and SKU are retained independently and SKU is not asserted to be a UPC
methodology.missingness: daily absence is preserved as a gap and is not treated as deletion or zero
methodology.promotion_prices: derived effective unit prices are labeled and never replace regular prices

scope: Gala Freeport–Merrick public online catalog; not asserted as physical shelf prices

errors: source product 347673 has no name; used an explicit ID-based placeholder
